summary: iter223 second-half testing complete: Video mode endpoint, expanded mixed library (tier-5/6), UI button + VIDEO badge all verified. 8/8 backend tests passed, frontend UI tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter223 second-half features fully tested: (1) POST /api/waste/benchmark/run with video_mode:true returns mode='video', video_frames=4, frames_analysed=4 per sample. (2) POST /run with video_mode:false returns mode='still', frames_analysed=1. (3) Video mode preserves multi_item shape (per_item, missing_items, extra_items, F1). (4) GET /samples returns 43 samples with ≥18 bs-mix-* including tier-5 and tier-6. (5) GET /status returns sample_count=43. (6) PATCH trust_fingerprint and POST trust-all-matched regression paths work. (7) Frontend: '🎥 Video mode' button visible with data-testid='bench-run-all-video'. (8) Frontend: VIDEO badge '🎥 VIDEO · 4f' visible in run detail drawer for video-mode runs.

video_mode_endpoint.details: POST /run with video_mode:true returns run with mode='video', video_frames=4. Per-sample frames_analysed=4.

still_mode_regression.details: POST /run with video_mode:false returns mode='still', frames_analysed=1 (regression verified)

video_mode_multi_item_shape.details: Video mode preserves per_item, missing_items, extra_items, F1 fields in per_sample

expanded_mixed_library.details: 43 samples total, ≥18 bs-mix-* samples including tier-5 (bs-mix-t5-*) and tier-6 (bs-mix-t6-*)

frontend_video_mode_button.details: '🎥 Video mode' button visible with data-testid='bench-run-all-video'

frontend_video_badge.details: '🎥 VIDEO · 4f' badge visible in run detail drawer for video-mode runs

accuracy_trajectory.note: From main agent context - not re-tested
accuracy_trajectory.11_sample_mixed: 66.6% D → 88.3% B → 90.5% A plateau after 2 trust cycles
